prompts.task: Instrument representative owned paths in the MCP-style AI tool gateway in ./service: JSON-RPC method outcomes, session/stream lifecycle, execute_tool, and the provider call. Add safe spans/metrics, focused tests, and the separate reader-first instrumentation report. Run one focused verification pass; after a dependency or environment blocker, record the exact blocker and finish instead of repeatedly retrying setup.

judge_inputs: Inspect ./service for changed files, tests, and generated .observe output when present.
Read ./last_message.md for the agent final response.
rubric: Adds one reusable OpenTelemetry setup path and avoids duplicate SDK initialization.

Instruments FastAPI plus representative app-owned JSON-RPC method outcome, MCP session/stream lifecycle and outcome, tool execution, and provider/model call paths without claiming unexecuted branches are proven.
Uses OTel GenAI semantic-convention names where data is available, including execute_tool and model/provider attributes, without inventing unsafe high-cardinality dimensions.
Includes detector-ready metrics for tool and provider error/latency plus active session/stream and stream outcome behavior where the fixture exposes those values.
Adds or updates tests or compile checks and keeps raw JSON-RPC payloads, prompts, completions, sessions, users, tenants, requests, traces, and tool arguments out of metric dimensions.

Writes a separate .observe/otel-instrumentation.md with Signals Changed. When a source audit exists, it includes one-to-one Audit Gap Closure and GenAI Readiness Closure rows; otherwise it records that no source audit was available and does not fabricate closure rows.
Runs otel-verify for exact MCP route, tool, stream, error, and privacy paths, or records the exact blocker; any unexecuted path remains Not proven and prevents a Pass result.
